overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dark neon-lit service corridor, exiting into a bustling futuristic city street with towering holographic advertisements and outdoor market stalls. The scene transitions from enclosed artificial lighting to a bright open urban environment with dense cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with red neon floor lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit corridor with neon red floor lights

entered.detail: vertical green neon sign with glowing letters mounted on the left wall
corrugated metal security shutter covering the left wall
linear red neon light strips embedded in the floor
scattered cardboard boxes and trash on the concrete floor
dark wooden bar counter with stools visible in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow, dimly lit service corridor. Red neon lights illuminate the floor while a green neon sign glows on the left wall. The space is enclosed with metal shutters and scattered debris, creating a gritty cyberpunk alley atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor with bar seating leading to street exit

events.description: pedestrian with backpack walks past the camera from right to left
exits the enclosed corridor into the bright open cyberpunk street

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the corridor toward the bright exit, passing by a bar area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking from the street entrance toward the interior corridor

entered.detail: large open doorway leading to the bright street outside
glowing pink and blue holographic advertisement screen on the right wall
red cushioned stools lined up along the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the latter part of the corridor where a bar with red stools lines the right wall. A pedestrian walks past toward the interior as the camera approaches a bright exit. The lighting gradually shifts from artificial neon to natural daylight visible through the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy cyberpunk commercial street with holographic advertisements and market stalls

events.description: dramatic shift from dark artificial lighting to bright midday sunlight
turns slightly left while walking through the market area

agents.ego_description: walking out into the bustling street and moving through the pedestrian market area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a market stall canopy
pedestrian in white shirt walking along the street

entered.detail: massive golden holographic figure towering above the buildings in the distance
tall futuristic buildings with glass facades and neon accents lining the street
large digital screen displaying animated advertisements on the building facade
yellow and brown vendor stall canopy with goods displayed underneath

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast cyberpunk city street bathed in bright sunlight. A massive holographic statue dominates the skyline in the distance while market stalls line the street. The camera moves through moderate pedestrian traffic among towering skyscrapers with glowing digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor food market with active vendor stalls

events.description: slows down and approaches the food vendor stall

agents.ego_description: approaching a food stall and observing the vendor preparing food

notable_agents.action: female vendor with dreadlocks working at the food stall counter
man wearing a cowboy hat walking past the camera

entered.detail: food preparation counter with plates and condiments visible
grill with skewers and cooking equipment emitting steam
glass case displaying prepared food items

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a food vendor stall where a woman is preparing food behind a counter. Steam rises from a cooking grill while pedestrians, including a man in a cowboy hat, walk through the market area. The environment features dense market infrastructure with overhead canopies and cooking equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit service corridor into the expansive brightness of a bustling futuristic city. It begins by navigating a narrow, gritty alleyway where red and green neon lights reflect off metal shutters and scattered debris. As the camera passes a small bar with red stools and a lone pedestrian, the dim artificial glow gradually gives way to the natural daylight streaming through a nearby exit. The scene then opens into a vast urban street bathed in sunlight, where the camera glides past towering skyscrapers and a massive holographic statue dominating the skyline. Finally, the movement leads into a dense market area, passing through pedestrian traffic toward a food vendor where steam rises from a grill under overhead canopies.
